---
title: "Drone Multispectral Coregistration (DJI Dataset)"
author: "Iris Nana Obeng"
date: "2026-02-25"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(terra)
library(imager)
library(RNiftyReg)
library(RNifti)

setwd("~/Desktop/drone ms coregistration")
```

## Load multispectral bands

```{r load-images}
files <- c(
  "DJI_20251115110614_0003_MS_G (1).tiff",
  "DJI_20251115110614_0003_MS_R.tiff",
  "DJI_20251115110614_0003_MS_NIR.tiff"
)

ms <- rast(files)
names(ms) <- c("Green","Red","NIR")

ref_red <- ms$Red
green   <- ms$Green
nir     <- ms$NIR
```

## Alignment Functions

```{r alignment}
align_band_simple <- function(ref_mat, target_mat, max_shift = 20){

  best_cor <- -Inf; best_dx <- 0; best_dy <- 0
  rows <- nrow(ref_mat); cols <- ncol(ref_mat)

  for (dx in -max_shift:max_shift){
    for (dy in -max_shift:max_shift){

      shifted <- matrix(NA,rows,cols)

      r_dst <- (1:rows)+dy
      c_dst <- (1:cols)+dx

      ok_r <- r_dst>=1 & r_dst<=rows
      ok_c <- c_dst>=1 & c_dst<=cols

      shifted[r_dst[ok_r],c_dst[ok_c]] <-
        target_mat[(1:rows)[ok_r],(1:cols)[ok_c]]

      valid <- is.finite(ref_mat) & is.finite(shifted)

      if(sum(valid)>1000){
        cc <- cor(ref_mat[valid],shifted[valid])
        if(!is.na(cc) && cc>best_cor){
          best_cor<-cc; best_dx<-dx; best_dy<-dy
        }
      }
    }
  }
  list(dx=best_dx,dy=best_dy)
}
```

## Edge Detection

```{r edge-detection}
get_edges <- function(img){

  im <- as.cimg(t(img))
  im <- (im-min(im))/(max(im)-min(im))

  sobel_x <- as.cimg(matrix(c(-1,0,1,-2,0,2,-1,0,1),3,3))
  sobel_y <- as.cimg(matrix(c(-1,-2,-1,0,0,0,1,2,1),3,3))

  sobx <- imager::convolve(im,sobel_x)
  soby <- imager::convolve(im,sobel_y)

  edges <- sqrt(sobx^2+soby^2)
  edges <- edges/max(edges)

  t(as.matrix(edges))
}
```

## Edge-Enhanced Affine Alignment

```{r edge-alignment}
align_nir_affine <- function(ref_rast,target_rast){

  fact <- max(
    ceiling(ncol(ref_rast)/2000),
    ceiling(nrow(ref_rast)/2000)
  )

  ref_small <- aggregate(ref_rast,fact=fact)
  tgt_small <- aggregate(target_rast,fact=fact)

  ref <- as.matrix(ref_small,wide=TRUE)
  tgt <- as.matrix(tgt_small,wide=TRUE)

  ref[!is.finite(ref)] <- 0
  tgt[!is.finite(tgt)] <- 0

  ref_e <- get_edges(ref)
  tgt_e <- get_edges(tgt)

  ref_nif <- asNifti(ref_e)
  tgt_nif <- asNifti(tgt_e)

  reg <- niftyreg(
    source=tgt_nif,
    target=ref_nif,
    scope="affine"
  )

  # APPLY TRANSFORM TO SAME SCALE IMAGE
  tgt_small_nif <- asNifti(as.matrix(tgt_small,wide=TRUE))

  aligned_small <- applyTransform(reg,tgt_small_nif)

aligned_small <- rast(as.matrix(aligned_small), 
                      extent=ext(ref_small),
                      crs=crs(ref_small))

  # UPSAMPLE BACK TO RED GRID
  aligned_full <- resample(
    aligned_small,
    ref_rast,
    method="bilinear"
  )

  aligned_full
}
```

## Prepare matrices

```{r prepare-matrices}
ref_red <- ms$Red
green   <- ms$Green
nir     <- ms$NIR

ref_red_mat <- as.matrix(ref_red, wide=TRUE)
green_mat   <- as.matrix(green, wide=TRUE)
nir_mat     <- as.matrix(nir, wide=TRUE)

aligned_rasters <- list(Red = ref_red)
```

## Coregister Bands

```{r coregistration}
ref_red_mat <- as.matrix(ref_red,wide=TRUE)
green_mat   <- as.matrix(green,wide=TRUE)

res_green <- align_band_simple(ref_red_mat,green_mat)

green_shift <- imshift(
  as.cimg(t(green_mat)),
  res_green$dx,
  res_green$dy
)

green_shift <- t(as.matrix(green_shift))
green_r <- rast(green_shift)

ext(green_r) <- ext(ref_red)
crs(green_r) <- crs(ref_red)

aligned_rasters$Green <- green_r

cat(sprintf("✓ Green aligned (dx=%d, dy=%d)\n",
            res_green$dx, res_green$dy))



# --- NIR ALIGNMENT ---
nir_r <- align_nir_affine(ref_red,nir)

cat("✓ NIR aligned using EDGE-AFFINE transform\n")
```

## RGB STACKS FOR PLOTTING

```{r rgb-stacks}
rg_before <- c(ref_red,green,green)
rg_after  <- c(ref_red,green_r,green_r)

rn_before <- c(ref_red,nir,nir)
rn_after  <- c(ref_red,nir_r,nir_r)

rgb_before <- c(green,ref_red,nir)
rgb_after  <- c(green_r,ref_red,nir_r)


cat("✓ RGB stacks prepared\n")
```

## Red + Green

```{r plot-rg, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
par(mfrow = c(1,2), mar = c(2,2,3,1))

plotRGB(rg_before, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Red + Green - Before Alignment")

plotRGB(rg_after, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Red + Green - After Alignment")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

## Red + NIR

```{r plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
par(mfrow = c(1,2), mar = c(2,2,3,1))

plotRGB(rn_before, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Red + NIR - Before Alignment")

plotRGB(rn_after, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Red + NIR - After Alignment")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

## Green + Red + NIR

```{r plot-rgb, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
par(mfrow = c(1,2), mar = c(2,2,3,1))

plotRGB(rgb_before, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Green + Red + NIR - Before Alignment")

plotRGB(rgb_after, r=1,g=2,b=3, stretch="lin",
        main="Green + Red + NIR - After Alignment")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
```

```{r}
cat("\n✓ Coregistration complete\n")
```
